title: Ultra Premium 4:5 Cinematic Poster

imagePrompts.prompt:
Create an ultra-premium 4:5 cinematic poster inspired by Yumi’s Cells, blending cozy Korean slice-of-life storytelling with trendy zodiac-core aesthetics. Keep the real subject as the clear center focus with natural skin texture, authentic facial features, and realistic identity preserved — no over-editing or face distortion.

 Subtly enhance the mood with softer eyes, a relaxed gaze, and warm “main character” energy. Surround the subject with multiple tiny 3D chibi “cells” based on her, designed like glossy Korean collectible figures with oversized heads, expressive emotions, cinematic lighting, jelly-like reflections, and adorable chaotic energy.

 Each mini cell should represent a different emotional state: clingy, sleepy, dramatic, overthinking, jealous, chaotic, exhausted, romantic, existential, confident, crying, dancing, panicking, scrolling on phone, sipping iced coffee, etc — like emotions fighting for control of her personality.

Make the zodiac identity dominate the scene using glowing zodiac symbols, constellation maps, horoscope doodles, celestial sparkles, galaxy textures, floating astrology icons, handwritten notes, and dreamy cosmic particles matching the Pisces aura.

Add stylish English editorial typography like: “Inside The Mind of a Pisces”, “Certified Dreamy Chaos”, “Emotionally Offline”, “Main Character Fantasy Activated”, integrated naturally into the composition. Include playful doodles, sticker outlines, arrows, stars, motion trails, sparkles, handwritten comments, and Korean webtoon-style reaction effects interacting with both the subject and mini cells.

Visual style: dreamy Korean webtoon aesthetic, luxury K-drama poster composition, warm ambient daylight, soft pastel + creamy neutral palette, subtle golden glow, layered scrapbook textures, cozy blurred room background, emotional visual clutter, cinematic depth, aesthetic film grain, organized chaos, Pinterest/TikTok viral energy, and a polished editorial finish.
